name: std-rating-review
description: std-rating-review — Airbnb / Amazon / Google Maps style review surface. Header with aggregate score + Write CTA, per-star distribution bars, working sort chips (recent / top rated / lowest), scrollable reviews list with author + stars + comment + helpful action. Topology = loading / viewing / composing / submitting / submitted / error.

schema.name: std-rating-review
schema.description: std-rating-review — Airbnb / Amazon / Google Maps style review surface. Header with aggregate score + Write CTA, per-star distribution bars, working sort chips (recent / top rated / lowest), scrollable reviews list with author + stars + comment + helpful action. Topology = loading / viewing / composing / submitting / submitted / error.

fields.name: reviews
fields.description: A list of individual review entries.

fields.name: totalReviews
fields.description: The total count of reviews associated with this view.

fields.name: starDistribution
fields.description: Distribution of reviews across star ratings.
fields.synonyms: star counts, rating breakdown, star frequency

fields.name: currentSort
fields.description: Specifies the current sorting order applied to the reviews.

fields.name: draftRating
fields.description: The user's tentative star rating for the review.

fields.name: draftComment
fields.description: The text content of a review in draft state.

fields.name: errorMessage
fields.description: Text displayed when an error occurs during review submission.
fields.synonyms: error text, error message, failure message

emits.description: Signals a draft rating has been created or modified.
Signals a review has been successfully submitted.
Signals a change in the review sorting criteria.
Indicates a review has been marked as helpful.
Triggers a full refresh of the review data and UI.
Signals that the reviews data has been successfully retrieved.
Indicates that loading reviews was unsuccessful.
Indicates a review has been successfully saved.
Indicates a review save operation failed.

events.name: Reviews loaded
events.description: Signals that the reviews data has been successfully retrieved.

events.name: Reviews load failed
events.description: Indicates that loading reviews was unsuccessful.

events.name: Review saved
events.description: Indicates a review has been successfully saved.

events.name: Review save failed
events.description: Indicates a review save operation failed.

events.name: Change Sort
events.description: Signals a change in the review sorting criteria.

events.name: Mark Helpful
events.description: Indicates a review has been marked as helpful.

events.name: Rate Draft
events.description: Signals a draft rating has been created or modified.

events.name: Submit Review
events.description: Signals a review has been successfully submitted.

events.name: Restart
events.description: Triggers a full refresh of the review data and UI.

children.content: It will appear on the page shortly.

cancelLabel.label: Cancel button
cancelLabel.description: Label on the cancel button inside the compose form

submitLabel.label: Submit button
submitLabel.description: Label on the primary submit-review button

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for cards rendered by this atom.

sortOptions.label: Sort tabs
sortOptions.description: Sort modes shown as tabs above the reviews list

subjectTitle.label: Subject title
subjectTitle.description: Name of the item being reviewed (shown in the header)

reviewFields.label: Review form fields
reviewFields.description: Inputs shown in the review compose form

writeLabel.label: Write CTA
writeLabel.description: Label on the call-to-action that opens the compose form

starDistribution.label: Star bars
starDistribution.description: Per-star distribution displayed as horizontal progress bars

emits.description: Signals a review draft has been created or updated.
Signals a review has been successfully submitted.
Triggers a refresh of the review data and UI.
Indicates a review has been successfully stored.
Indicates a review save operation failed.

events.name: Rate Draft
events.description: Signals a review draft has been created or updated.

events.name: Submit Review
events.description: Signals a review has been successfully submitted.

events.name: Review saved
events.description: Indicates a review has been successfully stored.

events.name: Review save failed
events.description: Indicates a review save operation failed.

events.name: Restart
events.description: Triggers a refresh of the review data and UI.

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Visual style of the wrapper card. Layer 2 cardLook knob — render-ui references @config.cardLook on the compose card.

submitEvent.label: Submit event
submitEvent.description: Event emitted when the user submits the form

allowComment.label: Allow comment
allowComment.description: Show a free-text comment field below the stars

title.label: Form title

allowPhotos.label: Allow photos
allowPhotos.description: Let the user attach photos to the review

submitLabel.label: Submit button
